canonicalRule: A control is active only when its claim status, local evidence paths, validation commands, receipt hook, and HF/UDS exposure boundaries are explicit.
cleanRoomRule: Original A11oy controls only; no external control catalog, upstream schema, proprietary prose, or private material copied.

controls.title: Public claim status gate
controls.description: Every public claim resolves to code, tests, DOI records, manifests, receipts, releases, or an explicit staged/roadmap label.

receiptHook.description: Runtime helper emits a receipt over public-claim scan output and source commit via packages/policy/src/contracts/controls.ts.

invariants: reject all-green proof claims without current proof report
reject HF-as-canonical wording
reject UDS endorsement/catalog wording without separate evidence

controls.title: Clean-room public pattern synthesis
controls.description: Public sources inspire patterns only; private/unlicensed material, upstream code, prose, schemas, and branding are not copied.

receiptHook.description: Runtime helper emits a receipt binding source URL, license/copying boundary, and original SZL transform via packages/policy/src/contracts/controls.ts.

invariants: privateIngestionAllowed must be false
copyingRule must be pattern-only
endorsementBoundary must reject implied endorsement

controls.title: Theorem-to-runtime evidence map
controls.description: Runtime theorem claims map to explicit files, tests, commands, caveats, and claim statuses.

receiptHook.description: Receipt can bind theorem manifest ID, runtime file, test command, and commit.

invariants: runtime evidence does not imply full Lean proof closure
staged proof-only claims must stay non-demo until runtime hooks exist

controls.title: Formula gate execution
controls.description: Layer 6 formula gates execute tested runtime hooks for false position, Madhava bounds, Liu Hui pi, adversarial robustness, and summation invariants.

receiptHook.description: Formula gate decision receipt with formula name, Lean anchor, allow/deny, and payload hash.

invariants: non-finite gate inputs fail closed
runtime gate claims cite proof status separately

controls.title: Operational receipt integrity
controls.description: Operational receipts are hash-chained with canonical payload hashes, Merkle roots, sequence checks, previous hashes, timestamp monotonicity, and quorum sanity.

receiptHook.description: Primary receipt substrate for MCP/Cursor/Claude/A11oy actions.

invariants: duplicate receipt IDs fail
broken previous hashes fail
timestamp regression fails
weak or impossible quorum labels fail

controls.title: QEC receipt witness
controls.description: Shor/CSS/Kitaev runtime parity checks provide receipt-integrity witnesses, not blanket quantum-threshold claims.
invariants: CSS consistency must be explicit
Shor majority behavior must be tested
do not claim a quantum threshold theorem

controls.title: UDS operator proof-point packaging
controls.description: A11oy packages manifests, attestations, source fallback boundaries, and tamper verification as an operator proof point.

receiptHook.description: Build receipt over MANIFEST.json, attestations, payload digest, and verification command.

invariants: do not claim UDS catalog acceptance
do not claim Defense Unicorns endorsement
catalog-grade claims require signed assets and external signer verification

controls.title: Hugging Face diligence mirror
controls.description: Hugging Face payload is generated from tracked GitHub source and is never canonical release truth.

receiptHook.description: Publication receipt with source commit, branch, files copied, and payload map.

invariants: metadata must include source commit and verification commands
HF wording must remain mirror-not-canonical

controls.title: Benchmark evidence discipline
controls.description: Benchmark and competition-math benchmark claims require corpus digest, raw-score reporting, judge panel, receipt chain, and unsupported-claim rejection.
invariants: competition-math benchmark claims stay raw-score only
no live score is claimed without sealed corpus and receipts
reject cracked/solved/AGI-proven language

controls.title: Autonomous learning promotion boundary
controls.description: Agents may dream, evaluate, and propose; named human promotion and CI evidence are required before publication or deployment.

receiptHook.description: Runtime helpers emit proposal, evaluation, and human-promotion receipts; dedicated autonomous harness remains staged.

invariants: no self-approval
no self-promotion
no publication without replay and receipts
